articles.title: Bonnie Tyler, who topped the charts with epic ‘Total Eclipse of the Heart,’ has died at 75

summary: Bonnie Tyler, iconic singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' passed away at 75.

Boston residents remember her music as a significant part of the 1980s pop landscape.
